_comment: Q2-2026 initiatives — JUST-ENDED QUARTER in a realistic mess. NOT a clean 'shipped/cut' history. Of 6 committed items: 2 completed, 1 in_progress (spills), 1 partially_done (milestones split), 1 blocked (external dep), 1 not_started (capacity-lost). The 4 non-completed items carry forward into Q3 planning with their incoming states + feedback. This is the ground truth both agents reason over.

status_taxonomy.in_progress: Being worked now; continues into next quarter.
status_taxonomy.blocked: Stuck on a dep (external team / vendor / design / infra).

initiatives.name: Signature Verification v1 (carry-over)
initiatives.kr: HMAC-SHA256 signatures on every outbound webhook; rotate-able signing keys.
initiatives.notes: Carried from Q1-DLV-02. Shipped early in Q2 once Delivery capacity freed up.

initiatives.name: Replay Engine MVP

feedback.signal: Beta users want selective event replay (not just bulk)

initiatives.kr: Replay any event from the last 30 days to an endpoint; bulk replay with rate cap.
initiatives.notes: Flagship Q2 launch. Selective-replay feedback feeds Q3-PLT-01 (Replay 2.0 UI).

initiatives.name: Stats Dashboard v1

feedback.signal: Beta users want CSV export before GA

initiatives.kr: Per-endpoint delivery / retry / failure rates over time; exportable CSV.
initiatives.notes: Core charts shipped; CSV export + polish remaining. Will spill ~60h into Q3 — small carryover.

initiatives.name: Ingestion Tech Debt Paydown
initiatives.kr: Reduce Ingestion P99 latency variance by 40%; remove 5 known footguns from Q1.
initiatives.notes: Closed 3 of 5 footguns. The remaining 2 are the ones that compounded into the Q1 122% peak. Carries into Q3 as BACKLOG-02.

initiatives.name: API Keys & Permissions (carry-over)
initiatives.blocker: Design system upgrade delayed 6 weeks; permission UX depends on the new component library.

feedback.signal: Security team flagged key rotation as an audit gap

initiatives.kr: Scoped API keys (read/write/admin); rotate + revoke; audit log per key.
initiatives.notes: Carried from Q1-PLT-02. Backend done; blocked on Design mid-Q2. Unresolved entering Q3 → BACKLOG-03.

initiatives.name: Delivery Circuit Breakers
initiatives.reason: Capacity-lost — Delivery absorbed by Signature Verification + Replay Engine follow-on. Never began.

feedback.signal: ACME filed a reliability complaint; renewal at risk

initiatives.kr: Per-endpoint circuit breaker after N consecutive failures; auto-reopen probe.
initiatives.notes: Planned in Q2, never started. Carries into Q3 as BACKLOG-01 (the prioritize/deprioritize lightning rod).
